note: Parity gate for the TypeScript inference + state-builder port. python_features is the exact 73-float continuous vector produced by environment._build_state (features 0..72, already normalized to [0,1]); player_ids_compact are the 5 raw embedding indices at state positions 73..77. q_dueling / q_dqn are full-precision argmax inputs in network order [shoot, pass_1..4]. The TS port must match within |dQ| <= 1e-4 and |dfeature| <= 1e-6.
